Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Xorrus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Xorrus is the Dragon King's left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Xorrus is the left hand of the Dragon Monarch and is called Desert-bringer, the Breath of Destruction, the Eternal Sandstorm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Xorrus is a gold dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Xorrus was one of the Heralds who formed the original pact of Ghostwater.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Xorrus is Sophara's grandmother and a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Xorrus is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Xorrus is someone Lindon was planning to beat on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Xorrus is a gold dragon Herald.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Fury finished off Xorrus.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Xorrus once had territory in Eastern Ashwind.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Xorrus grew in power and wreaked revenge on a village.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
